user_query: I'd rather do the ROM than the AGO. Change the activity on Day 3 to the ROM.

description.from: World-class art museum with Canadian and international collections. Indoor cultural experience in Frank Gehry-designed building. Quiet and contemplative atmosphere.
description.to: Canada's largest museum of world culture and natural history, featuring diverse galleries and the iconic Michael Lee-Chin Crystal.

updates.reasoning: Replaced Art Gallery of Ontario (AGO) with Royal Ontario Museum (ROM) as requested. Preserved the 2-hour duration.
